title: Oaxacan Fried Dough Balls
description: A crispy, cheesy fried dough ball recipe inspired by Mexican flavors.

ingredients.name: oaxacan cheese
ingredients.notes: queso fresco or asadero work well

ingredients.name: fried
ingredients.notes: about 2-3 inches deep in a pot

instructions: 1. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat until it reaches 375°F.
2. Cut the pizza dough into small balls, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
3. Dust the dough balls with flour to prevent sticking.
4. Fry the dough balls in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried dough balls from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. Sprinkle the oaxacan cheese over the fried dough balls.
